meta.title: What were those crazy lights in SoCal?!?! It was AWESOME! (2018)
meta.description:
There were some CRAZY lights and giant smoke cloud west of LA on October 7th, 2018... what were they?!? Did you see them? Well, luckily, us rocket nerds were patiently waiting for this launch and even knew it'd have this amazing phenomena!

Here's my livestream from the event telling you EVERYTHING! https://youtu.be/Pj2a0ZiB3OI

Here's the official SpaceX livestream - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=vr_C6LQ7mHc

Last year, there was a similar launch - https://youtu.be/EGOaHm0s6Es

Independent footage from the ground by Jim Mudgett - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=0q5i-IuicbM

Thumbnail photos by Tony Qin.

Want more info? Here you go! https://everydayastronaut.com/prelaunch-preview-spacex-saocom-1a/

Check out my new podcast!!!! - https://ourludicrousfuture.com

Show your support and join our discord channel by becoming a Patron - http://patreon.com/everydayastronaut

Everyday Astronaut hats, prints, shirts and more at - https://everydayastronaut.com/shop/

Thinking about ordering a Tesla? Get free unlimited supercharging!! http://ts.la/tim19804

Already order a Model 3 and waiting for delivery? You can use my referral code too (talk to your advisor) tim19804 :)
